changelog.title: SEO Cleanup + Source Normalization + Newsletter Page
changes: Trimmed 66 oversized seoTitles (>60 chars) and 32 oversized seoDescriptions (>160 chars) at word boundaries — Google now sees full meta in SERPs
Wrapped newsletter.html in proper HTML head/body with canonical, OG, and Twitter Card tags (was a bare HTML fragment)
Normalized 8 inconsistent source names (e.g. aol.com → AOL, pbs.org → PBS, phys.org → Phys.org)
Re-synced EMBEDDED_ARTICLES blob in index.html with articles.json after the metadata edits
Corrected 'Source Bias' WB card from misleading '85% academic/gov' to actual '~31% academic/gov, ~51% with established news included'
Added newsletter.html to sitemap.xml (and patched sitemap generator so future runs include it)
Removed duplicate generate_llms_files() call in regenerate_all_articles()

changelog.title: Site Improver: Sitemap Refresh + SEO Tags
changes: Regenerated sitemap.xml — surfaces 20 newer articles search engines were missing (157 articles total)
Added rel=canonical, og:url, and Twitter Card tags to about.html and category.html
Fixed stale model reference in 'Our Weights & Biases' transparency card (now reflects claude-sonnet-4-6 + claude-haiku-4-5)

changelog.title: Smart Ranking + Compliance Lint
changes: Composite scoring for Top Stories (featured, recency, authority, Shoemaker alignment)
Category cap prevents single-topic hero domination
Deterministic compliance lint gate added to publish path
Pool-based image picker eliminates photo repetition
Mobile share-bar overflow fix

changelog.title: Secure Pipeline + Tip Submissions
changes: Two-phase pipeline: --fetch-only for candidates, --publish for approved
Tip submission form connected to Formspree backend
Dedicated editorsNote field with styled rendering
MARCoNS research study featured as lead article

changelog.title: SEO Overhaul + Pipeline Audit
changes: Standalone article pages with OG tags, Twitter cards, JSON-LD
Added sitemap.xml and robots.txt
SEO agent upgraded with keyword extraction
Pipeline audit: dead code removal, parse safety, summary length enforcement

changelog.title: Shoemaker Knowledge Corpus
changes: Integrated 82-paper Shoemaker research corpus (8,000+ chars)
Research agent activated as pipeline gatekeeper
Image URL validation prevents broken images
First fully autonomous publish batch

changelog.title: Category Archives + UX Polish
changes: Category archive pages with search, sort, filtering
Redesigned AI Journalism transparency section
Mobile nav fix (close on tap)
UTM tracking on all MoldCo partner links

changelog.title: Duplicate Detection Agent
changes: Gate 0: content-aware dedup with three detection layers
Removed 14 duplicate articles from seed database
Photo agent upgraded with topic-specific Unsplash matching

changelog.title: Full Auto-Publish Pipeline
changes: Fully autonomous: RSS fetch, 11-gate AI review, auto-publish
Added PubMed, EPA/CDC/HUD feeds
Reader tip intake and screening
SEO optimization gate

changelog.title: Claims Compliance + Research Gate
changes: Compliance agent enforcing MoldCo claims rules
Research verification agent for Shoemaker alignment
Headline rewriting agent

changelog.title: Interest Scoring Agent
changes: Articles scored 1-10 on newsworthiness (7+ threshold)
Source verification gate
Category-based image fallbacks

changelog.title: Launch
changes: Initial launch with seed articles
Basic AI editorial rewriting
Photo assignment agent
